topic: Nuclear test detonation US/Russia/China before April 2026
summary: No nuclear detonation has occurred. Record longest gap since Jan 2026. US clarified "testing" means subcritical. Russia only assessing preparations. China denies all allegations.
content:
Key findings:
1. As of Jan 15, 2026 - world set record for longest period without nuclear test (8yr 4mo 11d since NK Sept 2017)
2. Trump Oct 2025 rhetoric about resuming tests - Energy Secretary Wright clarified this meant subcritical/non-critical tests (don't count per resolution criteria)
3. DOE/NNSA stated nuclear explosive tests "not necessary" and "counterproductive"
4. Russia: Novaya Zemlya site prepared (Dec 2025), Putin instructed assessment of whether to BEGIN preparations. Peskov: preparations NOT underway.
5. Russia's position: will test IF US tests first
6. China: US accused China of secret test in 2020 (Feb 2026 accusation), China denied. Trump's own STRATCOM nominee said neither China nor Russia conducting explosive tests.
7. Metaculus CP: 0.1%
8. Arms Control Association article: "No other country is conducting nuclear explosive tests"
9. Timeline: Only ~7 weeks remain. Even starting preparations NOW would be insufficient.
